response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with ~15 years across full-stack, embedded, and AI-agent work. Current role at re:cinq directly matches the stack (TypeScript/Node.js) and includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), proven architecture and TDD discipline, and relevant cloud/Docker/Kubernetes exposure via GISCollective and Optilyz (AWS CDK).
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience matching a key requirement
Deep full-stack polyglot background with TypeScript/Node.js, Java, and React-adjacent frontends
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
React exposure mentioned only briefly (Optilyz); much frontend history is Ember.js
No PostgreSQL experience called out (MongoDB/MySQL only)

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq
15+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js core stack
